predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_descendants_or_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased leaves descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_other_or_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased leaves only other heirs or no heirs at all.

predicates.name: is_common_property
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the common matrimonial property of the deceased.

predicates.name: is_jointly_held_between_spouses
predicates.description: The asset is held exclusively in undivided co-ownership between the spouses.

predicates.name: is_own_property_of_deceased
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the own (separate) property of the deceased.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_return_right
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal return as referred to in article 4.24 or 4.25.

predicates.name: deed_or_testament_excludes_usufruct_on_return_asset
predicates.description: The deed of gift or testament provides otherwise regarding usufruct on the asset subject to legal return.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires usufruct of the entire estate of the deceased (second person).

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_common_share
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires full ownership of the deceased's (second person) share in the common and exclusively jointly held property.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_own_property
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires usufruct of the remaining own property of the deceased (second person).

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_return_asset
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires usufruct of the asset subject to legal return belonging to the deceased (third person).

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse (first person) acquires full ownership of the entire estate of the deceased (second person).
